description: Build the full Tasks page with Kanban board + List view, full CRUD operations, drag-and-drop reordering, inline editing, and smooth animations. Also build the Calendar page with day/week/month views, drag-to-create events, and drag-to-resize.
steps: Create app/dashboard/tasks/page.tsx: Full task management page with: 1) Header with page title, view toggle (Kanban/List), and 'Add Task' button. 2) Kanban view: columns for To Do, In Progress, Done. Each task card shows title, due date badge, subtask count. Cards are draggable between columns using @dnd-kit/core and @dnd-kit/sortable. 3) List view: table-style rows with checkbox, title (inline editable on click), due date, status badge. Sortable by drag handle. 4) Task creation: slide-up modal/panel with title, notes (textarea), due date picker, status selector. 5) Task editing: click task to open detail panel (slide from right) with all fields editable. 6) Delete: swipe or context menu with confirmation. 7) All mutations call the existing API functions from lib/api.ts (fetchTasks for loading). 8) Empty state with illustration and CTA. 9) Loading skeleton animation. 10) Spring animations on card drag, drop, create, delete.

Create app/dashboard/calendar/page.tsx: Premium calendar with: 1) Header with month/year display, navigation arrows, and view toggle (Day/Week/Month). 2) Month view: grid of days, events shown as colored pills within each day cell. Click a day to switch to day view. 3) Week view: 7-column time grid (hours on left axis), events as positioned blocks. 4) Day view: single column time grid with detailed event blocks. 5) Create event: click empty time slot to open creation modal (summary, start time, duration using createCalendarEvent from lib/api.ts). 6) Event display: colored blocks with summary text, time, hover to show full details. 7) Drag-to-create: drag across time slots in week/day view to create event with pre-filled time range. 8) Event click: opens detail view with edit/delete options (deleteCalendarEvent from lib/api.ts). 9) Today indicator (red line in day/week view). 10) Smooth view transitions with framer-motion. 11) Date navigation with date-fns for formatting.

Create shared utility components needed: components/ui/DatePicker.tsx (simple date picker dropdown), components/ui/Skeleton.tsx (loading skeleton component with shimmer animation), components/ui/EmptyState.tsx (reusable empty state with icon, title, description, CTA).
acceptance_criteria: Tasks page renders with Kanban and List view toggle
Tasks can be viewed in both Kanban board and list formats
Drag-and-drop works for task reordering in both views using @dnd-kit
Task CRUD operations use existing fetchTasks API
Calendar page renders with Month, Week, and Day views
Calendar uses fetchCalendarEvents and createCalendarEvent/deleteCalendarEvent from lib/api.ts
View transitions are animated with framer-motion
